# Pull Request

## Plain-English outcome

Describe what should happen in non-technical terms.

> When ..., AIQM should ..., so that ...

## Validation plan

Describe how you proved the outcome was reached.

> I know this works because ...

## Related documents

Link or name the relevant items:

- BRD / AC:
- TSD / architecture:
- Boundary contract:
- Defect / backlog item:
- Test traceability row:

## Change type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New behaviour
- [ ] Provider integration
- [ ] Desklet/UI change
- [ ] Install/update change
- [ ] Security-sensitive change
- [ ] Documentation-only change
- [ ] Refactor

## Tests

- [ ] I wrote or updated the failing test before implementation
- [ ] I added or updated fixtures where provider behaviour changed
- [ ] I ran `npm run ci`
- [ ] I ran `npm run validate:dev-flow`
- [ ] I could not run a required check and explained why below

## AI assistance

- [ ] AI tools helped with this change
- [ ] I manually reviewed the generated output
- [ ] I removed generated code I did not understand or need
- [ ] I accept responsibility for the submitted change

## Security

- [ ] No tokens, cookies, auth URLs, device codes or credential-bearing files are included
- [ ] Logs and fixtures are redacted
- [ ] `docs/security.md` was updated where required

## Notes / risks

Describe remaining risks, known limitations or follow-up work.
